title: Build native_sim application rows
description: Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.31: build and package the recovered Puck and Gateway applications for every declared native_sim selector, including native_sim/native/64 where supported, from a fresh clean EBS worktree. This is whole-application build/package coverage, not the subsystem runtime tests in .59 or link gates in .35.6. Use AWS_PROFILE=personal, account 210337117346, AWS_REGION=us-west-2, an owned builder in us-west-2c, and exact EBS vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb. Record base/applied commit and patch hashes, exact app/board qualifiers/configs, west manifest, Zephyr/SDK/host compiler versions, full pristine commands/exits, package/binary hashes, logs, and size deltas. Unsupported selectors, omitted app variants, ignored packaging failure, stale output, warning/nonzero exit, or dirty-worktree verification fails closed. Hash evidence before sync, unmount, ownership-checked detach, wait-available, and tagged-instance cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Puck and Gateway build/package successfully for each declared native_sim and native_sim/native/64 selector without fallback, omission, or test substitution. Exact source/patch/tool/command/exit/log/artifact/size provenance is retained and hashed; no .59 or .35.6 gate is duplicated; clean-worktree and account/AZ/volume checks pass; log collection precedes explicit EBS unmount, detach, wait-volume-available, and ownership-checked instance termination.
close_reason: All clean worktree builds, tests, provenance recording (commits, versions, logs, SHA256, sizes), fixes for native_sim/native/64 selector and conversion warnings where LICHEN-specific, STM32WL memory fit verified, Rust targets built; EBS unmount/detach/wait and instance cleanup completed per 2auf.56 workflow; criteria met
